footer.tagline: The platform connecting upcycling stakeholders for a more sustainable and circular future.

home.hero_title: Your stuff deserves a second shot
home.hero_subtitle: The platform connecting individuals, professionals and trainers around the circular economy.
home.how_subtitle: In a few simple steps, join the circular economy and reduce your environmental impact.
home.step1_desc: Publish a listing to give away or sell your unused objects.
home.step2_desc: Find individuals or professionals interested in your items.
home.step3_desc: Join workshops and training sessions to transform your objects.
home.listings_subtitle: Discover the latest listings from the community
home.no_listings: No listings available at the moment
home.workshops_subtitle: Join our sessions and learn to upcycle
home.cta_subtitle: Sign up for free and start upcycling today.

admin_languages.title: Language Management
admin_languages.subtitle: Manage the languages available on the platform
admin_languages.retranslate_confirm: Retranslate the entire "{{name}}" language from French? Existing translations will be replaced.
admin_languages.delete_confirm: Delete language "{{name}}" and all its translations?
admin_languages.libre_info_desc: The translation file must be present in the repository (public/locales/[code]/translation.json) and declared in languages.json before activating the language.
admin_languages.translation_warning: Make sure the translation file has been deployed before creating the language.

create_listing.deposit_note: A deposit request will be created and validated by our team.
create_listing.moderation_note: Your listing will be reviewed by our team before publication (usually within 24h).

twofa.sms_active_desc: An SMS code will be required at each login
twofa.sms_inactive_desc: Enable to secure your account with an SMS code at each login

email_twofa.inactive_desc: Enable to receive a code by email at each login
